title: astragalus pterocarpus
intro: Astragalus pterocarpus, also known as the horse trefoil or sweet pea trefoil, is a perennial legume native to China and other parts of Asia, known for its small, white or pink flowers and compound leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. The health benefits of Astragalus pterocarpus include reducing stress and fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Astragalus pterocarpus can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
